name: TheSpoiler
short_description: When you come to your senses, you find yourself trapped in a nightmare. The books scattered around will guide you through your future.
detailed_description:
When you come to your senses, you find yourself trapped in a nightmare.
The books scattered around will guide you through your future.

When the clock chimes, everything around transforms with the darkness.
And this place is inhabited by monsters and witches. Escape the nightmare and avoid harm from them.

About Game

The Spoiler is an first person escape game infused with psychological horror.
You can progress through the story by solving simple puzzles and finding items.

Game elements

Simply puzzle, Chasing enemy
Include short cut scene

Option

Graphics settings, Language(KR, EN), Sounds

Control

W A S D is move , Q E is hang up item, SHIFT is run , CTRL is crouch
Mouse is rotate camera
ESC is open menu

Play Time

About 30 minutes
